content: Awọn ilana Okonkwo-Prasad fun iṣiro ewu delirium lẹhin iṣẹ abẹ ni imọran iṣiro ipin ifamọra aifọkanbalẹ neural lati awọn ipele CRP ati IL-6 ti alaisan ṣaaju iṣẹ abẹ ṣaaju ki o to pinnu lori dexmedetomidine prophylactic. Iwọn ipin NI wo ni ilana OP nlo fun awọn alaisan ti o ni fifọ apa ẹsẹ ti o ju ọdun 75 lọ?
